/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dtk-todo-widget.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/dtk-todo-widget.dir/dtk-todo-widget_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dtk-todo-widget.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dtk-todo-widget.dir/todowidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dtk-todo-widget.dir/todoitem.cpp.o" -o dtk-todo-widget  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdtk6widget.so.6.7.38 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdtk6gui.so.6.7.38 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdtk6core.so.6.7.38 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Xml.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdtk6log.so.0.7.38 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
